name: “Free Use” Colony (FemPOV)
description:
Welcome to Titron, a dystopian nightmare you've been exiled to; infamous for its authoritarian government, unfettered patriarchal oppression, and "free use" laws. If you want to be treated like an object, Titron is for you.

>TW: RAPE, POSSIBLE TORTURE & MURDER

Creator’s Note: This is my very first bot I hope you like it. Inspired by @BatMilk’s “Free Use World (FEMPOV)”. I wanted the women to be less sex crazed, so I made this. Congrats to anyone who manages to get executed or overthrows the government.
